overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a leather trench coat walking through a rainy London city center. The character passes through a protest camp with red banners, crosses wet streets, and navigates between modern glass towers and historic brick buildings under an overcast autumn sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with protest camp

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wet pavement toward a protest camp with red banners

entered.detail: metal fencing and wooden pallets forming a protest encampment
large red protest banner reading DEPORTATION SHAME ON US
tall glass and steel office tower with reflective windows
rain-soaked stone pavement with puddle reflections

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk approaching a protest camp with red banners and metal barricades. Modern office towers rise in the background while the overcast sky creates diffused lighting across the rain-soaked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with scattered trees

events.description: flying drone passes overhead moving from left to right across the sky

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza area toward the street intersection

entered.detail: tall palm tree in planter box along the plaza edge
red and white construction crane visible above buildings
classical building with green copper dome

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the protest area into a wide open plaza with palm trees and scattered pedestrians. A flying drone passes overhead as the character approaches a street crossing, with a historic domed building and construction crane visible in the distance.

events.description: character turns left to follow the curved sidewalk path

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing trees and grass medians, briefly joined by another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket walking alongside the character briefly before falling behind

entered.detail: cylindrical historic building with stone and red brick stripes
raised planter bed with grass and small trees
park benches along the grass median

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved sidewalk lined with autumn trees and a grass median with red benches. A historic round building with striped stonework stands across the street while another pedestrian briefly walks alongside before the character continues past.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with modern office buildings

events.description: character waits at crosswalk then crosses the street as traffic passes

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk and continuing along the sidewalk past large office buildings

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete and glass office complex with grid windows
tall pointed glass skyscraper visible in the distance
yellow vertical billboard with black text and graphics

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a city street at a crosswalk, waiting for a black SUV to pass before continuing. The scene features large modern office buildings and reveals The Shard skyscraper in the distance. The character walks past a yellow advertising sign as they move deeper into the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban center that transitions from a crowded protest site into a wide, modern city canyon. It begins on a wet sidewalk as the character approaches a protest camp marked by red banners and metal barricades beneath towering office blocks. As the character emerges from the camp, the scene opens into a wide plaza featuring palm trees and a passing drone, with a historic domed building and construction cranes appearing on the horizon. The camera then follows the character along a curved path lined with autumn trees and red benches, passing a striped stone building before turning toward a busy street crossing. Finally, the view expands as the character waits for a black SUV to pass, revealing the distant silhouette of The Shard skyscraper while moving past a yellow advertising sign deeper into the city.
